name: plausible-mcp
description: MCP server for Plausible Analytics — query traffic, conversions, and compare periods from any AI tool

scripts.deploy: SENTRY_RELEASE=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && npx wrangler deploy --outdir .sentry-build --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$SENTRY_RELEASE && npx sentry-cli releases new $SENTRY_RELEASE --org sentry-developer-experience --project plausible-mcp && npx sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org sentry-developer-experience --project plausible-mcp --release $SENTRY_RELEASE .sentry-build && rm -rf .sentry-build
